content:
📊 **AI 科研日报** — 2026年05月26日 周二
> 🔥 Agent工具 + 🚀 推理加速 + 💻 本地部署

## 🔥 GitHub 开源项目精选
1. [0xSero/codex-shim](https://github.com/0xSero/codex-shim)
   Local Responses-API shim that exposes Factory BYOK models (and optional ChatGPT  | ⭐590
2. [MoonshotAI/kimi-code](https://github.com/MoonshotAI/kimi-code)
   The Starting Point for Next-Gen Agents | ⭐474
3. [jianshuo/ccglass](https://github.com/jianshuo/ccglass)
   See what your coding agent (Claude Code, Codex, Kimi) sends to the model — local | ⭐283
4. [VILA-Lab/FigMirror](https://github.com/VILA-Lab/FigMirror)
   An Automated AI Agent Tool for Plotting Your Data in Any Paper's Figure Style. | ⭐280
5. [bryanyzhu/agentic-ai-system-course](https://github.com/bryanyzhu/agentic-ai-system-course)
   Use agent to learn agent - A skeleton course on how to design, build, and operat | ⭐203
6. [open-gsd/gsd-pi](https://github.com/open-gsd/gsd-pi)
   A powerful meta-prompting, context engineering and spec-driven development syste | ⭐199
7. [testerlingcodo/gemini-antigravity-cli](https://github.com/testerlingcodo/gemini-antigravity-cli)
   gemini antigravity 2.0 cli google terminal ai agent tool agy migration guide mcp | ⭐165
8. [realrossmanngroup/no_ai_slop_writing_rules](https://github.com/realrossmanngroup/no_ai_slop_writing_rules)
   Claude Code reference: write in Louis Rossmann's voice, never like AI slop. Port | ⭐148

## 📈 今日趋势
- Agent + 工具调用持续火热
- 推理效率优化成为焦点
- 多模态模型进展迅速
- 本地部署需求增长
